overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy action RPG (Bloodborne), showing a player character in a long coat and tricorn hat walking through a narrow rocky canyon at sunset. The character emerges to a panoramic mountain vista, traverses a narrow cliff ledge, and falls into a chasm. The environment features jagged rocks, sparse white vegetation, and dramatic golden hour lighting with strong rim lighting on the cliff faces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon, navigating the rocky terrain

entered.detail: tall dark jagged rock formation forming the left boundary of the canyon
sunlit orange-brown rock face with rough texture on the right side
uneven stone pathway winding through the canyon floor
sparse pale white spiky plants growing from cracks in the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides. Sparse white vegetation grows from the rocky ground. The path winds forward with only a narrow gap of sky visible ahead.

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon into an open mountain vista with full sky visibility
character begins turning right to follow the cliff edge path

agents.ego_description: walking forward toward the open vista then turning right to follow the cliff edge

entered.detail: layered mountain silhouettes visible in the distance against the sky
bright golden-orange sky with scattered clouds indicating sunset
steep drop-off on the left side of the path revealing the chasm below

segments.scene_description: The scene opens dramatically to a wide mountain vista with golden sunset lighting. The distant mountain range stretches across the horizon. The character continues along the path before turning right to follow the cliff edge, with the left cliff wall falling away to reveal the drop.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliff ledge with vertical drop

events.description: character falls or jumps off the cliff edge, camera shifts to top-down perspective

agents.ego_description: moving along the narrow cliff ledge before falling into the chasm below

entered.detail: deep dark crevice between the rock formations with visible depth
sheer rock wall rushing past as the character falls downward

segments.scene_description: The character hugs the right cliff wall along a perilous narrow ledge. The camera follows closely as the character loses footing or jumps, transitioning to a top-down view showing the rapid descent into the dark chasm between the rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a rocky canyon into a vast mountain vista that ends in a sudden vertical plunge. It begins with the character winding through a narrow passage of steep cliff walls and sparse white vegetation, where only a sliver of sky is visible overhead. As the path opens dramatically, the scene expands into a wide panoramic view of a distant mountain range bathed in golden sunset lighting. The camera then follows the character as they turn right to traverse a perilous narrow ledge, with the protective cliff wall falling away to reveal a sheer drop. Finally, the perspective shifts to a top-down view as the character loses their footing, plummeting rapidly into the dark chasm between the rocks.
